feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Rainbow Springs
entry.summary:
Author: Zelena_Fey

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,186Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Derek's life is small and safe. A pilot who stays in hotels, avoids risk, keeps the world at arm's length. Then he finds a journal that belongs to Stiles, a stranger whose pages are filled with fearless choices, spontaneous hikes, travel, and living. When he learns Stiles is a flight attendant and overhears him mentioning Rainbow Springs, Derek makes an unusual choice: follow him there. He needs to meet him.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski
  • Derek Hale
  • Stiles Stilinski
  • Artist Stiles Stilinski
  • Pilot Derek Hale

entry.title: An Endless Road to (re)Discover
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,764Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 22

Summary: Sheriff Stilinski recovers from his injury and tries to keep the pack together in the absence of their Alpha; Chris Argent struggles with guilt over his role in the pack's recent troubles; Teal'c tries to balance his responsibilities to the pack with his obligations to the Free Jaffa Nation and the SGC; Daniel Jackson supports Derek through his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor and his search for his sister.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Thief
entry.summary:
Author: Hedwig221b

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,619Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: There was no physical equivalent to what it felt like they did, so intimate it was. It was seeing each other naked, it was deep make-outs, it was dry-humping, and it was sex, but it was none of it. Perhaps, if someone opened their chest cavities, took their hearts and squished them together, that’s what it would feel like — feeling their valves open and close, the blood pump, the muscles contract, and one heartbeat pulse right into the other. Derek offered his hand. “Let me show you one more time.” “Show me what?” “What would it feel like to have an alpha.” Warmth burst in Stiles’ tight chest. His stomach swooped. His spark trembled in anticipation, reaching out, striving to taste that power again. Going red under the constant gaze of those hazel eyes, Stiles put his hand in Derek’s. He couldn’t help but give a small inhale at their sparks meeting once more. Heat. Weight and weightlessness. Tight embrace and high, impenetrable walls. Power. Safety.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Stiles Stilinski: Emotional Support Human & Werewolf Chew Toy
entry.summary:
Author: Jinxy143

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,576Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 134

Summary: Stiles has options. You’re just along for the ride — so hop into Roscoe and see where this goes.Bring your Stiles body pillow. You might need it. Scott gets bitten.Everything changes. Suddenly, the world is louder, sharper, and a whole lot more dangerous — and the only thing keeping Scott from losing control is his loud-mouthed, chaos-magnet best friend, Stiles. Which would be fine.Except it’s not just Scott. Derek’s watching.Peter’s interested.And for some reason, everyone is getting a little too intense about Stiles Stilinski. Now Stiles is stuck in the middle of werewolves, bad decisions, and a rapidly escalating situation he definitely did not sign up for — while trying very hard not to think about what it means to be the thing grounding them all. Because this?This is not normal. And it’s only going to get worse.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: [Podfic] your fangs against my skin (the sound of your bones) by Hedwig221b
entry.summary:
Author: Squishyowlbear

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: This was it, then, huh? It was that easy for Derek to invite someone to his den. Someone other than Stiles. He healed the wolf. Stiles killed his tormentor, mended his blood and bones, and let him sleep beside him. But none of it was enough. He wasn’t a spark, after all, but a witch — evil and alone, locked up in his tower. Witches didn’t get happy endings.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Another Poly Story
entry.summary:
Author: HolmesMoriarty

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,537Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 9

Summary: “That’s what I wanted to talk to you about.” Stiles’ world falls apart after hearing this. It was a normal day, like any other, when his boyfriend of five years prepared a meal for them inside their apartment. Stiles thought he would be getting engaged tonight because he had never seen Derek cook even once. It was always Stiles’ thing, so he expected something, but not that.... “Stiles?” Derek asks as Stiles is frozen in place. His boyfriend sighs. “You don’t like the idea.” Of course, Stiles doesn’t!!! “What... Derek.” He closes his eyes, trying to breathe correctly. “Where is this coming from?” Derek opens his mouth, but Stiles isn’t done. “We’ve been together for five years, not once you expressed that you might be polyamorous. Not even once. So, you, asking out of the blue to open our relationship, doesn’t make much sense.”

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Not The Comic Relief
entry.summary:
Author: FastFadingFiction

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,222Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 36

Summary: Derek Hale agreed to become the first bisexual Bachelor expecting polished contestants, carefully controlled romance, and maybe a chance to feel less alone in his marble mausoleum of a mansion. Instead, he gets Stiles Stilinski: a husky supernatural mystery novelist in oversized flannels and dark-rimmed glasses who accidentally discovers werewolves are real, uncovers a hunter conspiracy hiding inside the show, and makes Derek laugh hard enough to forget how lonely he’s been.

entry.title: A Very Stilinski Affair
entry.summary:
Author: Christina786

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 84,785Chapters: 14/15Kudos: 24

Summary: Derek frowned. “You Stilinskis really have to be that honest?”She shrugged. “What’s the point in being secretive and mysterious?”Now Derek grinned “Oh, you should meet my uncle, you’d hate him.” This is based on a post on tumblr in which Stiles is afraid that Derek might fall for his sibling once he meets them. It kind of got out of hand and I started indulging in some morally gray but not evil Peter. Basically, Peter falls for Stiles' sister instead, because they kind of bond over their different but slightly similar traumas and it turns out Stiles' sister has been hiding a few bodies in her closet.

entry.title: pants on fire
entry.summary:
Author: 42hrb

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,224Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 111

Summary: "Dude," Stiles huffs, rolling out of Derek's warm embrace with some effort, Derek clinging to him like he's worried Stiles might disappear. "I am researching. Derek's helping me." "Then where the fuck are you pants? Did they burn up from all the lying?" "I —" Stiles looks down to see he is, in fact, completely naked. Huh, so that middle of the night, too horny to keep their hands off of each other sex wasn't a dream. "No, they didn't burn up from all the lying. Good lord, are you 12? I'm just good at multitasking."

entry.title: To Safe Your Life
entry.summary:
Author: DoEScasTIElLove

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,985Chapters: 8/11Kudos: 126

Summary: Scott has been turned into a werewolf just before their last year of high school. Managing him on full moons without any help turns almost fatal for Stiles until a dark, brooding wolf swoops in and saves his life. Apparently, he had to bite him to do that, not transforming him but bonding them together as mates.As it turns out, the Hale pack is alive and thriving, and the hunters are after them, but how could Stiles concentrate on that. He has to figure out what being werewolf mated to Derek actually means.

entry.title: The Triskele and the Mischief Saga
entry.summary:
Author: Solinvictus22

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 89,108Chapters: 34/?Kudos: 18

Summary: Book 1: Nemes(plural, pronounced nim/s) are people naturally born with connection to the primordial energies of the Earth enabling them to cast magic, Stiles is born a Neme and so is the prince he guards, while they have the war on their heads, against Neme-hunters of Edenia, humans who unlocked the science that may end the age of magic users.

entry.title: If I could turn back time..... oh wait, I can!
entry.summary:
Author: Werewolfintraining

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 51,835Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 268

Summary: Agent Stilinski received the call late afternoon. He had to return to the Hellmouth in a hurry. He really thought there was enough time. He was prepared to face the demon once again. He was not prepared to see Derek Hale sacrifice himself, again.He has one chance, the cost is high, but Derek and his pup are worth it.He's willing to pay whatever the magic deems worthy.He pays in years, but he gains something unexpected.Ok. Now he's here. Is he supposed to save Peter too?

entry.title: Of A Butterfly's Wings
entry.summary:
Author: Mikaelsonbich25

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 148,633Chapters: 96/96Kudos: 316

Summary: Klaus had expected to be done with life after sacrificing himself. He was sure that he could finally rest and be done with it. But, much to his dismay, an otherworldly being had other plans, due to finding Klaus as a source of entertainment.In snatching away his desired death, Klaus Mikaelson was reincarnated into another world as a young magic caster named Stiles Stilinski. With no choice but to live, Klaus decides to use this opportunity to take over Beacon Hills and make it his kingdom.And maybe one day, he'll be strong enough to find a way back home to his world.

entry.title: What I Never Said
entry.summary:
Author: StormyBlack

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,931Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 150

Summary: Stiles is leaving for college—and maybe, for good. But before he goes, there's one last thing he needs to do: deliver a letter he was never brave enough to send. He doesn’t expect Derek to be there. He certainly doesn’t expect a goodbye that nearly breaks him. Years of unsaid things, quiet glances, and missed chances all come pouring out in ink—because if Stiles can’t have the future he wants, he’ll at least leave behind the truth.
